title: User Guides - 'New' tag
scenario: Newly released Poly device shows 'New' tag in User Guides section of App Settings, and tag persists for 6 months
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure the target Poly device is connected.
3. Tap the Menu icon (hamburger) or the Settings gear icon to open App Settings.
4. Scroll down to the 'User Guides' section within App Settings.
5. Observe whether a 'New' tag is displayed next to the user guide entry for the newly released Poly device.
6. Note the current date and verify that the 'New' tag is present.
7. After 6 months have elapsed from the device's release date, return to the same 'User Guides' section in App Settings.
8. Observe whether the 'New' tag is no longer displayed next to the user guide entry.
expected: A 'New' tag appears next to the user guide for the newly released Poly device in the User Guides section of App Settings, and the tag remains visible for 6 months from the device's release date. After 6 months, the tag disappears.
